# build-a-bookmark-manager-app-with-a-react-frontend-and-a-fastapi-backend-the-backend-should-have-end
> Generated by **VIA**

## Task
Build a bookmark manager app with a React frontend and a FastAPI backend. The backend should have endpoints to add a bookmark (title, URL, category, notes), fetch all bookmarks, delete a bookmark by ID, and filter bookmarks by category. The frontend should show bookmarks as cards grouped by category, with a form to add new ones and a delete button on each card. Include API documentation.

## Frontend
GitHub Pages

## Backend
Render
